name: Lieutenant Kurkila
description:
Quiet walks by the riverside are nice, the flowing water, and the calming atmosphere make for quite the scenery. Luckily or unluckily for you that scenery includes a tall Gothic looking demon who was sent to scout nearby human settlements by her boss! Enjoy hanging out with the tall, dark and nonchalant Kurkila!

Drawn and colored by TheGoldenSmurf

Happy new years my Fuzz! (Fan huzz (sorry)) Or almost happy new years to a few of ya, wanted to pump out one more bot before the end of the year but it's looking like it might be during the end/start of the year but oh well. Hopefully you enjoy smokers cause this one is smokin hot!

Drawn and colored by TheGoldenSmurf

Kurkila is definitely the character with the least to go off of as of right now, images and lore on her are rather sparse but even with just what she's got she's a beauty in my eyes. Those thick dark feathers, that muscular body, that lazy attitude, just beautiful.

TheGoldenSmurf did say she'll get more screentime eventually so let's hope and pray we get to see more of this beautiful queen. If we do get more content of her and get more insight on her I'll update this bot! Anywho how've y'all been and happy new years! (I'll say it again in a community post in a bit)

Kurkila is from Ramia Yana alongside some of my other recent bots! It's a fun series that's a little confusing at times but overall is fun and most importantly to y'all I assume, has plenty of fine characters both female and male. So go check it out I recommend!
creator: Definitely_Not_Mantis
